titleStmt.title: SII 18.123: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 123. (B.K. No. 163 of 1932-33.) NEGḶŪR, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Two pieces of a stone lying in the temple of Siddhēśvara.

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva is dated in the Chālukya-Vikrama year 48, Śōbhakṛit, Pushya śu. 13, Monday, Uttarāyaṇā-samkrānti corresponding to A.D. 1123, December 31 Monday; f.d.t. ·45. The Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrānti, however, fell on the previous Tuesday, the 25th December.

It states that, when Mahāpradhāna, Manevargaḍe and Daṇḍanāyaka Īs11varayya was governing the province of two six-hundreds and Banavase-nāḍu, Sōvarasa, the Manevergaḍe of the vaḍḍarāvuḷa and perjuṅka of Beḷuhuge Seventy and other officers made a grant of taxes in kind on certain agricultural products to god Siddhēśvaradēva, on behalf of Mallarasa, the Daṇḍanāyaka of vaḍḍarāvuḷa. Mention is made of Jñānaśakti-Paṇḍita of the Kāḷāmukha school.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja pa
ramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḻakaṁ cā
ḷukyābharanaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara rājyamuttarōttarābhivri
dhdhipravardhdhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire tatpādapa
dmōpajīvi . śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ maneverggeḍe daṁḍanāyakanīśvarayyaṁ śrīmade raḍa
ṟunūṟuṁ banavasenāḍa duṣṭanigrahaviśiṣṭapratipāḻanadiṁ sukhadināḷu
ttamire śrīmatu vaḍḍarāvuḻada daṇḍanāyakaṁ mallarasana deseyiṁ
beḷuhige 70ttaṟa vaḍḍarāvuḻa perjjuṁkada maneverggaḍe sōvarasanuṁ
Udeyādityanuṁ manneyara perggaḍe mūvarumiḻdu
śrīsiddhēśvaradēvargge Āṁgabhōgakkaṁ ghaṁṭe dhūpa Ārati naṁdādīvi
ge nivēdyakke biṭṭa dharmmamenteṁdaḍe svasti śrīmaccāḷukyavikramava
rṣada 48 neya sōbhakritusaṁvatsarada pauṣya suddha 13 sōmavāra
Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrāntivyatīpātadaṁdu negeyūralu tīvida taṁ
hattiya maḻave 30 koṁḍu paḻtihēṟu 30 koṁḍu jōḻa na
ṟu tovari dhānyavarggada hēṟu 20 koṁḍu biṭṭaru . negevū
mummuridaṇḍamiddu biṭṭa taḷadokkalalu hasuṁbege
biṭṭar .

nāḍige
yyalu hāgavaṁ biṭṭar
Aṟuvattokkaluṁ Aynūrvvaruṁ su
dayadintidaneyda kāyda puruṣaṁgāyuṁ ma
daṁ kāyada koyva pāpige kurukṣētra
vāraṇāsiyalekōṭi munīdraraṁ kavileyaṁ vēdāḍhya
raṁ koṁdudoṁdayasaṁ sārggumi(ṁ)deṁdu sāṟedapuvī śaiḷākṣaraṁ dhā
triyoḷ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundharā ṣaṣṭhirvarṣasaha
śrāṇi miṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . Ī dharmmamanaḷidāta paṁcamahāpātakanara
kadalāḷutta muḷukuttamikku . Idaṁ pratipāḷisidātanu mahāpuṇyamaneydu
gu . Ī kramadiṁ suṁkamaṁ biḍeneṁdu vakrisidavana vaṁśa nirvaṁ
śavakku saptanarakadalāḷuttaṁ muṟukuttamikku . © ©
kāḷāmukhasiddhāntadēvara siśyarstānācāryya rjñānaśakti
paṇḍitaru . Aynūrvvaru nakara hiṭṭu horagaṇiṁ
baṁdaḷava bhaṇḍadalu soṇṭigevattavaṁ biṭṭar . maṁgaḷa
mahāśrī śrī śrī śrī simmōja barada
Digital edition of SII 18.123 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
